description.content: Discover emission factors in the Climatiq dataset.
Returns a paginated list of emission factors matching the given query, region, year, source, sector, and other filter parameters. Used to discover the activity_id needed for estimation calls.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Activity-based emission estimation.

Calculates CO2e emissions by combining a selected emission factor (via activity_id or emission_factor object) with caller-supplied activity parameters such as energy used, distance, money spent, or weight moved.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Emissions from passenger travel and accommodation.
Calculates emissions for passenger car travel based on distance and vehicle parameters.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Calculates passenger flight emissions for one or more legs using IATA airport codes and class of travel.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Calculates emissions associated with hotel accommodation by country, number of nights, and number of rooms.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Multi-modal freight emissions using GLEC factors.
Calculates well-to-wheel freight emissions across multi-leg journeys using GLEC factors for sea, air, road, and rail.

response.name: Freight emissions per leg and total.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Emissions from electricity, heat, and fuel consumption.
Calculates Scope 2 electricity emissions for a given region and amount of energy consumed, with optional location-based and market-based methods.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Calculates emissions from purchased heat or steam using region-appropriate factors.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Calculates Scope 1 emissions for combustion of liquid, gaseous, and solid fuels.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Cloud computing carbon footprint.
Calculates the CO2e of CPU usage on a cloud provider, automatically selecting region-specific grid factors.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Calculates emissions from RAM usage on a cloud provider in a specified region.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Calculates emissions from object or block storage on a cloud provider in a specified region.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Spend-based emissions for purchased goods and services.
Calculates Scope 3.1 emissions from purchased goods and services using expenditure data and EEIO factors.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
AI-driven automated emissions calculation.
Uses Climatiq's NLP model to interpret a free-text description and automatically select an emission factor and method.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Industry classification mappings for emission factors.
Returns the list of supported industry-classification systems and how they map to Climatiq emission factors.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism reporting.
Calculates embedded emissions for goods covered by the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Reference data such as regions and unit types.
Returns the geographic regions Climatiq supports for region-specific emission factors.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Returns the unit types accepted by estimation endpoints (energy, distance, weight, money, etc.).
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Climatiq is a carbon emissions calculation API that gives developers programmatic access to a curated database of emission factors and to purpose-built calculation endpoints. The API exposes search over the factor catalog and a family of estimation endpoints for activity-based and spend-based calculations across travel, freight, energy, cloud computing, procurement, and CBAM workflows. Authentication uses an API key sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Responses are JSON with deterministic emission outputs in CO2e (kg) plus the underlying factor metadata.
